title: Transparent Glass Border
description: Makes the border on glass blocks transparent like just stained glass
body:
A few years ago I tried making this as pack as a subsitute for connected texture mods not being updated.  But learned the glass block did not support semi transprent textures even though the stained glass blocks did.  I reported it as a bug, but it was marked as "working as intented" within a few days.  In 26.1-Snapshot-7 they changed the block model format to allow all blocks to have transparent textures

only works 26.1-Snapshot-7 and onward

You may put this in your modpacks as long as you credit me.
